hbe16322ag49d9g47f1g857eg3ce02c7767f5: You again? Show me the boots, or face the Absolute's judgment.
h7220cd48g6b25g4ecfga0e2ge637a690d9e2: Did I not warn you? Slice 'im up, fellas!
h3b1991a7ged5eg4e33gbac6g2b95e30943a0: Did I not warn you? Slice 'er up, fellas!
hfdf3907bgf8fdg45f9gbeedg9301819a0ab4: Here they are, safe and sound.
h0e3be5cfg7658g4216g8ec4gb32ba9a87ff3: Godsdamned dwarf. What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
hc34eb34bgd313g4a6egb5d3g7960ec80a50c: Duergar, like you? Saw his body a way back. Myconids got him.
h847511b3ge27dg43edgb643g18a36702d410: Dammit. The sergeant'll be pissed about her boots.
h084654efg8325g471dg9f73g90fe62867c2b: Come on, hoon. You're coming with me. I won't be the one to tell the sergeant what happened.
ha7a5121fgbd58g4b27ga475g7fa024b49f70: She just loves your sort, you see. Real keen on deep gnomes. Heh.
he66eb637g8451g48d8ga5d6g7056f56d8e36: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'll head back with this one.
h0bc3a98cgd026g4946ga5a6g57d9ad55d1e3: *You continue forward in silence until the lights of a camp twinkle through the murk.*
h44db6525gfdacg4662gb2e6g5375e903724f: What a load of rothé shite. No way a mushroom killed Gekh.
ha8a002b0g3784g4a00g91e7gf69f9e64811c: I'm afraid Gekh is dead. He fell fighting the myconids.
h8852a678g9ac0g4615g87feg7a0d3015e809: See this brand? Let me pass.
h89396b9bgc73dg43e2g9096g705af71dd49f: I don't care what you've got scrawled on your skin. I don't like your face.
hd1ed22a8g081eg49fcga868g8218e70ee5a5: Hold up, boys. We got a deep gnome here - and rowing Gekh's raft, no less.
h871b4eddg2bedg4624g9f8bga9e2194a0ddf: You got guts floating out here like this. Where's Gekh? Who are you?
hb8ff54e8gff6eg4df2gaf6egaf8e58208ce3: Human! What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
h3050f0ecge453g47d0gba7dgf3b4d98cdf24: Tiefling! What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
h3ac76a20g9015g4fd8gbc3fga0165a08bee5: Elf! What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
h6a60b92dgc881g42c2gaa4bgb83a65d64f23: Dwarf! What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
h5b62ecafgadc5g488dg81a2g7edfe7becfd1: You! What are you doing on Gekh's raft?
h26f0f040gdbe3g43f1gb81dg564bdfd5c3d8: I work on Gekh's behalf. I'm after his sergeant's stolen boots.
h15773382g8d68g414bgb46fg24eca68f7137: Ho! How desperate is the cur, to make an ally of a human?
h2d87e045g069cg4457g9cf6ga4fa8c7b7ea4: Ho! How desperate is the cur, to make an ally of a dwarf hoon?
h2e381560g4e9bg4eedg9d4eg695c1c531549: Ho! How desperate is the cur, to make an ally of a gnome?
hcf77cd4egd47ag4dafgaf46gaf3816089e99: Ho! How desperate is the cur, to make an ally of a topsider?
h9e0deb70g24beg4eaeg85bcgbf6d07ec28ff: Ho! How desperate is the cur, that he calls on a helper?
h8d061b62g639eg46aegaf50ge3cedc919a1f: I will tell you now what the Sergeant told Gekh: until you have the boots, you will not cross.
h49b35320ge953g4c2ag99d4g804016a6dc95: Come back empty handed again, and you're feeding the fishes.
h233461c6g1b5dg48e0ga162g6b2503846cee: Raise your weapon. I mean to pass now!
h89c1df84g0ff0g44ffg9681g2851faff0fe0: I seek the sergeant - I believe she's keen to get these boots back.
hc2f54a9cg2fa6g4d2egb367g7d902e7eb182: Well I'll be - you got them. The sergeant's been whining nonstop.
h57d9ec7eg413dg45f9gb455gd864c1cb6de0: What about Gekh? Where's he at?
h4cd631bfga9e9g469eg9471g0d870933b887: He remained behind to find more gnomes.
h8f196502g1286g44ebgb4a5g774e84171714: But he let you go, eh? Suppose he figured the sergeant could sort you out.
h853429d9g6948g4ac4g8cc2ge5a0eca785f6: More like avoiding the sergeant, I reckon.
h477d467dg9ec4g4225g8ed2ga6db7963048d: He's dead. The myconids saw to that.
hfb398da0g2f36g4378g8013g45ab5631b6a8: You don't know Gekh? How'd you... ugh, whatever - I don't care.
h286415a9g16c5g4fd2gb83cg305f1bfe0e3d: The shite-brain's off shirking his duties somewhere.
h33d22c60g0c76g4a45g9fcfgf82bd32b7b33: Avoiding the sergeant, is he? Can't blame him. She mentioned something 'bout biting his toes off.
hca669cf9g1144g4329g8ae9g26e13ba1d90f: I saw a body left by the myconids - your 'Gekh' must be dead.
h1996f5ccg7478g4ef1g9f4bg1ee8abd3e97b: Damn - the sergeant'll be pissed 'bout her boots.
heb0a86eag13d6g458fg8a5dg20b264cee310: Come on - let's get you to shore. You're the one telling the sergeant what happened.
h2136b9c8g2772g477fga1a0gaf406d0d8548: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'll be heading back with the drow.
h69bfa8bbg16a7g4e50g868ag90bc9a687cd4: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'll be heading back with the, uh - with this one.
h49ecb6cdgb769g4f1ega786gc7afbd25f8d1: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'll be heading back with the hoon here.
h366f04fdg7eefg4007gbe4bga454c057153b: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'll be heading back with this one.
h09b06804gcdcfg40f2g88e8g3bc200a43276: What a load of rothé shite. No way a mushroom killed Gekh.
hfe2cb14dgc08fg4b83g8354g9cddf3d28015: I'm afraid Gekh is dead - he fell fighting the myconids.
h3a54c614g4900g4fd4g8b38g2e6e1ebb918b: Just let me cross - I have the brand, see?
ha49bb129ga593g4d00g8cc4g8934d294852f: I don't care what you've got scrawled on your skin. I don't like your face.
h5cf53793gc60dg43b1g9d10g923167eed568: In the name of the Absolute - you will let me pass.
haf1bee25g98c5g4565gb5e8gb542362d2024: All right, all right. No reason to get your horns in a twist.
hebab3d2bg3ee2g4e39g8d98g5d95f77d1d02: All right, all right. No reason to get your tongue in a twist.
h97f7631fg1752g44f2g89b6gaa93fb82ab71: Well, come on. Let's get you to shore. You'll need to report to the sergeant.
h6a4d6d6fg8386g4058gadbeg55964f311292: The rest of you - keep patrolling. I'm heading back with the drow.
h65d12bd5gad44g4e62g84edgec03c54c90fc: You's: keep patrollin'. I'm headin' back with this one.
ha3164208g150fg4509gbbe3gebd82ddf9fe2: The Absolute? Not bloody likely. Get him, fellas!
h13f4739ag3c0ag49b5g9198g9013f44e3d96: The Absolute? Not bloody likely. Get her, fellas!
hf2e4328eg4ee1g43d9ga104g97009ec6f6f4: I saw a body left by the myconids - your 'Gekh' must be dead.
hb3d369fegeec2g47fcgb005g12ad007b1374: Dammit. Gekh gone and screwed up. If he's dead, so's the squad.
h6b199c0fg1159g4166g8197g1f8022ba8c13: Move over - I'll take you to shore. You're the one telling the sergeant what happened.
h49dbf606gff6dg4095gad19gdd13a21613ec: The whole squad? Dammit. Gekh gone and screwed up. Nere'll lose his head over this.
he92d9a6eg65f9g4c35g8cb4gc30d51bebfc1: What a load of rothé shite. No way a mushroom killed Gekh.
h100b0152gedf8g4a7cg8529gb78d9e988c1b: I'm afraid Gekh is dead - he fell fighting the myconids.
h90d4441fgbcbag45cdgafe4g18b5fe2da6ed: Just let me cross - I have the brand, see?
h715140dagb505g4123g8cdbg01b73ea54ab4: You there! Drow! Why are you in Gekh's raft?
h1faf9b76ga10cg4fe5g865dged39375b0a0b: We aren't expecting more of you. Where's Gekh? Who are you?
